title: DeadAgain's Ultimate Mod
description: Two-in-one mod for a lot of things.
body:
WARNING! All Create-related stuff is removed in 1.2.1 and future versions. This is to make every item in the mod obtainable.
This includes:
- Zinc Casing
- Zinc Sheet
- Metal Transformer
- Recipes: Blaze Burner with Zinc Sheet, Chain with Zinc Nugget, Chain with Zinc Ingot, Iron Nugget to Zinc Nugget, Zinc Nugget to Iron Nugget, Iron Ingot to Zinc Ingot, Zinc Ingot to Iron Ingot, Get Metal Transformer, Stone to Cobble.

This mod doubles as a currency mod (1 Quintto = 1 Bread) and personal additions.

## Combiner recipes (you can swap the ingredients)
- Sand + Water Bucket = Dirt (with remainder Bucket)
- Paper + String = Name Tag
- Chest + Tripwire Hook = Trapped Chest
- Everything else = Junk

**Mod parts:**
# Quintto
Adds Quintto, better packing of bread.
# Personal additions
### Combiner
Combine blocks and items into one! Be careful, if you combine the wrong items, you get junk!
### Junk and Junk Block
Oops, you messed up in the combiner!
### Defense Block
Unbreakable* blocks for your protection!
*Can be broken if block is walkable, or by some modded mobs.
### Panic Alarm
MY EARS
### Alarm
Wakey wakey!
### Speaker
Crafting ingredient for the 2 items above.
